Test name: CCRm offset 50

Test Description

In the Car-to-Car Rear Moving (CCRm) scenario, subject vehicle travels forwards towards a target vehicle that is traveling at constant speed and is deviated in the lateral axis with a specific % from the subject vehicle. The foremost part of the subject vehicle strikes the rearmost part of the target vehicle.

  • Regulation or protocol: EURONCAP 2023 TP AEB/CarCar
  • Ego speed: 40 km/h
  • Target speed: 20 km/h
  • Overlap between both vehicles: 50 %
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1
←CCRm (60 km/h) CCRm offset 50 CCFTap (20 km/h -ego-, 60 km/h -target-)→
